pi_items.source: Task description and export script verify exact path
Task description and export script verify exact path
Found GE network code in the provided miniSEED filenames and trace headers
Verified the sum of the 3 source miniSEED files is 187,392 bytes, which securely satisfies the 51,200 byte threshold
Verified exactly 3 traces (stations BKB, GSI, SANI) are present in the provided dataset folder, resulting in at least 3 output lines

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to merge miniSEED waveform data using the scmssort utility and generate a trace inventory. The provided data is real-world seismic data from the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake, containing 3 traces from the GEOFON network (GE) at stations BKB, GSI, and SANI. The agent must produce a merged file at /home/ga/merged_waveforms.mseed that exceeds 51,200 bytes (actual combined size is ~187 KB) and an inventory file at /home/ga/waveform_inventory.txt listing the 3 trace lines.
